title: Git Stash
description: Learn to temporarily save uncommitted work with git stash, list stashes, apply, pop, and drop them.

tasks.prompt: Stash all tracked changes with message 'wip auth refactor'.
tasks.hint: Use git stash push -m with a message.
tasks.explanation: git stash push saves working directory and index changes temporarily.
git stash list shows indexed stash entries with their messages.

tasks.prompt: Apply the most recent stash without removing it from the stash list.
tasks.explanation: git stash apply restores changes but keeps the stash entry.

tasks.prompt: Apply the most recent stash and remove it from the stash list.
tasks.explanation: git stash pop applies and deletes the top stash entry.
git stash drop removes a specific stash without applying it.

tasks.prompt: Stash tracked and untracked files together.
tasks.explanation: -u includes untracked files in the stash snapshot.
